languages.text: {n}Ферренц издает потрясенное восклицание на лингва-технис, переходящее в резкий бинарный визг. Затем, смутившись своего порыва, техножрец пристыженно отходит в сторону, почтительно освобождая для вас путь.{/n}

{n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ферренц издает потрясенное восклицание на лингва-технис, переходящее в резкий бинарный визг. Затем, смутившись своего порыва, техножрец пристыженно отходит в сторону, почтительно освобождая для вас путь.{/n}

{n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz suelta una exclamación de sorpresa en Lingua Tecnis que da paso a un chirrido binario. Después, avergonzado por su exabrupto, el tecnosacerdote se hace a un lado para dejarte pasar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}费伦茨先是用科技文发出了一声惊呼，随即转为一阵尖锐的二进制尖啸。意识到自己的失态后，这位技术神甫有些窘迫地退到一旁，恭敬地为你让出道路。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}费伦茨先是用科技文发出了一声惊呼，随即转为一阵尖锐的二进制尖啸。意识到自己的失态后，这位技术神甫有些窘迫地退到一旁，恭敬地为你让出道路。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz laisse échapper une exclamation choquée en langage technique, qui se meut en un cri binhaire strident. Puis, gêné par son coup d'éclat, le technoprêtre s'écarte d'un air penaud pour vous laisser passer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz laisse échapper une exclamation choquée en langage technique, qui se meut en un cri binhaire strident. Puis, gêné par son coup d'éclat, le technoprêtre s'écarte d'un air penaud pour vous laisser passer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz, Lingua Technis dilinde şaşkınlık dolu bir nida atıyor. Bu, sonrasında keskin bir ikilidil çığlığa dönüşüyor. Ardından bu çıkışından utanan Tekno Rahip, çekingence kenara çekilerek saygıyla sana yol veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz, Lingua Technis dilinde şaşkınlık dolu bir nida atıyor. Bu, sonrasında keskin bir ikilidil çığlığa dönüşüyor. Ardından bu çıkışından utanan Tekno Rahip, çekingence kenara çekilerek saygıyla sana yol veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}フェレンツは驚きの叫びをリンガ・テクニスで発し、それが鋭い二音で鳴り響く。そして、その叫びに恥ずかしさを覚えたテクプリストは、恥ずかしそうに身を引いて、あなたに道を譲る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}フェレンツは驚きの叫びをリンガ・テクニスで発し、それが鋭い二音で鳴り響く。そして、その叫びに恥ずかしさを覚えたテクプリストは、恥ずかしそうに身を引いて、あなたに道を譲る。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz entfährt ein entsetzter Ausruf in Lingua Technis, der in ein scharfes binhärisches Kreischen mündet. Dann tritt der von seinem Ausbruch beschämte Techpriester mit gesenktem Blick zur Seite, um dir Platz zu machen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz lets out a shocked exclamation in Lingua-Technis, which shifts to a sharp binharic screech. Then, embarrassed by his outburst, the Tech-Priest bashfully steps aside, respectfully making way for you.{/n}
